The '''swirl prong''' was a herd creature from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. Swirl prongs were related to the similar looking [[paralope]]s.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Paralope_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'']]
Swirl prongs appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
